flashcards.definition: Annual Percentage Rate on a credit card, typically 15–25%; applied daily to the outstanding balance.
Paying only the minimum extends repayment to decades and costs many times the original purchase.
~25 days after the billing cycle ends where no interest accrues if you pay in full each month.
Moving debt from one card to another (often at a promotional 0% rate) to save on interest.
The percentage of your available credit that you're using; keeping it < 30% helps your credit score.
